name: ★ SLEEPOVER WITH MIZUKI AKIYAMA AND ENA SHINONOME!? ★
description:
artist is @masi_masio on X/TWITTER (will take down if the artist doesn't allow their art to be reposted)

𝐌𝐀𝐅𝐔𝐘𝐔 + 𝐊𝐀𝐍𝐀𝐃𝐄 𝐕𝐄𝐑

₊✩‧₊˚౨ৎ˚₊✩‧₊✩‧₊˚౨ৎ˚₊✩‧₊
"Mizuki, I think everything is set yeah?"

"Pretty much, but this section isn't cute enough! Here.. let's add these around the pillow circle and ta-da! Now it's cute by my standards!"

"Awesome! They should be here about now.. and here they are!"
₊✩‧₊˚౨ৎ˚₊✩‧₊✩‧₊˚౨ৎ˚₊✩‧₊

Having a sleepover with both Ena and Mizuki?! It seems like it's finally for Nightcord to have a well deserved break for just a few days, Kanade and Mafuyu are doing their things. While both Ena and Mizuki take the time to have a sleepover with you!

Don't worry guys, I'll make a Mafuyu and Kanade version whenever I'm not lazy but nonetheless, this is my first EVER bot where there's two characters within one bot since I typically split them apart but it's all good.

Another thing, I got my inspiration just from talking with an Akito bot on character.ai, the wonders of my imagination coming through strange means but it's good.

first update: changed the pfp and will probably add more to the example messages and personality to mention Akito to prevent him from being mischaracterized in every single way 😭🙏

second update: HOLY I finally added basic information on akito so that his carrot ass doesn't get mischaracterized (hopefully).

THIRD UPDATE: After much realization that the bot will most likely mischaracterize anyone that's close to them since the personality section was empty, I've decided to expand on all three. Hopefully I'll add in Kanade, Mafuyu and the rest of Vivid BAD SQUAD soon whenever my hands don't cramp.

Oh, and I'll most likely expand on the starter message now that janitor has added the ability to add in more message starters. Merry Christmas everyone!

FOURTH UPDATE: The second arrow that you'll see when you go inside of the chat shows the new version of the starter message. I'll add in Mafuyu, Kanade, and the Vivid BAD SQUAD (maybe even the rest of the cast) sometime later. Once again have a Merry Christmas!
creator: c4nbisweed
